## 🧪 Manual Testing Checklist

- [ ] **Builds Successfully:** Does the app run without crashing?
- [ ] **Feature Works:** Did you test the specific logic of this task?
- [ ] **No Regressions:** Did you check if this change broke existing features?
- [ ] **Responsive:** Does the UI look correct on different screen sizes?

## 🏁 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the team's style guidelines.

- [ ] I have pulled the latest from `dev` and resolved any conflicts.
